pricing.what: This page presents Mohtaoua's pricing plans to support training centers.
pricing.who: Center directors comparing Start, Performance, and Premium packs.
benefits: Packs tailored to each growth stage
takeaways: Media budget is billed separately by the platforms
The free audit helps calibrate the right pack

contact.what: Contact page to request a free marketing audit for your training center.
contact.who: Decision-makers ready to discuss acquisition, budget, and enrollment goals.
takeaways: Prepare your goals and estimated media budget

results.what: Gallery of real advertising performance for training centers.
results.who: Marketing managers who want proof before committing.
takeaways: Performance varies by offer and market

videos.what: Video library of testimonials, filmed case studies, and training marketing masterclasses.
videos.who: Prospects who prefer video format to evaluate the agency.

caseStudies.what: Detailed case studies: goals, strategy, budget, leads, and ROAS for training centers.
caseStudies.who: Decision-makers who want a concrete example before starting a collaboration.
takeaways: Each center has a unique context

blog.what: Expert blog on digital acquisition for training centers in Morocco.
blog.who: Marketers and education sector leaders who want to learn.
takeaways: Content optimized for search and AI engines
